# Turbidity Test

**Summary**: Measurement of the cloudiness or haziness of a fluid caused by suspended particles.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-he|He, 2015]] performed turbidity tests to assess the quality of separated water from the emulsion.

## Key Results and Findings

- The optimal demulsifier concentration for turbidity reduction was found to be 20% of diluted HEDTA. ([[2015-he|He, 2015, p. 117]])
